variants: Zoraida Peral is a distinguished expert in Chemical Physics, known for her significant contributions to the field. She is the author of the influential work titled Jasper Filament Guide, which has been praised for its innovative approach. In recognition of her accomplishments, Zoraida received the prestigious Magma Veil Prize, highlighting her impact on the scientific community. She is also an active member of the Periwinkle Planters Group, where she collaborates with fellow enthusiasts on various projects. Zoraida credits much of her success to her mentor, Diego Marrucci, who guided her during her doctoral studies.
